title: Directory Enumeration & IDOR
description: Use Gobuster to find hidden directories and exploit IDOR on Mutillidae.
problemStatement:
# Objective
Perform directory enumeration on Metasploitable and exploit an IDOR vulnerability in Mutillidae.

## Part 1: Gobuster
1.  Run Gobuster against `http://192.168.56.101`.
2.  Use wordlist `/usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt`.
3.  Identify at least three interesting directories (e.g., `/dvwa`, `/mutillidae`, `/phpmyadmin`).

## Part 2: IDOR
1.  Navigate to Mutillidae: `http://192.168.56.101/mutillidae`.
2.  Find the **User Info** page (OWASP 2013 -> A4 Insecure Direct Object References -> User Info).
3.  Observe the URL parameter or POST request that specifies the user.
4.  Use Burp Suite or browser to change the user identifier to view another user's information.

## Deliverable
Screenshot of another user's profile data displayed.
hints: IDOR: Look for a dropdown or parameter like `username=user1` or `uid=1`. Change the value.
expectedOutput: Profile of a different user (e.g., `adrian` or `john`) instead of your own.
solutionCode:
# Gobuster
gobuster dir -u http://192.168.56.101 -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -o gobuster.txt

# IDOR on Mutillidae
# Visit: http://192.168.56.101/mutillidae/index.php?page=user-info.php
# Intercept request, change username=test to username=admin
# Or change uid parameter if present.
